tasks.label: LaTeX: 一键编译(main)
tasks.command: xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error main.tex; $runBibtexForAux = { param($dir) if (Test-Path $dir) { Get-ChildItem -Path $dir -Filter '*.aux' -File | ForEach-Object { if (Select-String -Path $_.FullName -Pattern '\\bibdata\{|\\bibstyle\{' -Quiet) { $base = $_.FullName.Substring((Get-Location).Path.Length + 1) -replace '\\','/' -replace '\.aux$',''; bibtex "$base" } } } }; & $runBibtexForAux 'doc_thesis/contents'; & $runBibtexForAux 'doc_3in1/contents'; xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error main.tex; xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error main.tex
